title: Arm sues Qualcomm, seeks to quash Nuvia licenses
text: Arm Ltd. announced a lawsuit against Qualcomm Inc. QCOM, -0.85% on Wednesday that seeks to quash the designs of Nuvia, a chip-design startup founded by former Apple Inc. AAPL, -0.72% engineers that Qualcomm acquired last year for $1.4 billion. According to Arm, Nuvia's chip designs are based on Arm architecture, which gives Arm the right to decide if the licenses used for those designs can transfer to Qualcomm, and it does not want that transfer to happen.

title: Chips tech firm Arm sues Qualcomm and Nuvia for breach of license and trademark
text: Chips technology firm Arm Ltd, which is owned by Softbank Group Corp, said on Wednesday it has sued Qualcomm Inc and its recently acquired chip design firm Nuvia Inc for breach of license agreements and trademark infringement.

title: Exclusive-EU will not appeal court ruling against $991 million Qualcomm fine - sources
text: EU antitrust regulators will not appeal a ruling by Europe's second top court scrapping its 997-million-euro ($991 million) fine against U.S. chipmaker Qualcomm, people familiar with the matter said.
